label: Battery Point Lighthouse first lit
notes: Navigation aid anchoring the early harbor entrance.

label: Hobbs Wall narrow-gauge wharf track
notes: Wharf and timber-shipping infrastructure associated with Hobbs Wall operations.

label: First harbor jetty completed
notes: Early harbor-improvement milestone before the modern district era.

label: Crescent City Harbor District established
notes: Special-district governance frame for the working waterfront.

label: 1964 Alaska tsunami destroys harbor
notes: Disaster marker for the Good Friday tsunami.

label: Seawall and breakwater rebuilding begins
notes: Early reconstruction phase after the 1964 disaster.

label: 38-metric-ton dolos units installed
notes: Concrete armor-unit phase of the modern breakwater.

label: Tohoku tsunami destroys Inner Boat Basin
notes: Distant-source tsunami currents destroyed much of the inner harbor.

label: Tsunami-resistant Inner Boat Basin ($34M)
notes: Rebuilt inner basin with tsunami-resistant pile and dock design.

label: PIDP grant ($7.8M) for seawall upgrades
notes: Federal port-infrastructure funding for seawall and dock work.

label: Klamath dam removal - fishery recovery
notes: Klamath Basin restoration event affecting regional fishery expectations.
